summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EventFlow (Sensa) mobile event management app with focus on new features. Backend APIs working perfectly (19/19 tests passed). Frontend functionality excellent with all major features working including daily quotes, 4-tab navigation, standalone tasks, collapsible sections, statistics page, reminder editing, and export functionality. One design issue found: event names not displayed in UPPERCASE as required.

ui_bugs.issue: Dialog overlay intercepts clicks, requires force click to submit
ui_bugs.workaround: Force click works, functionality not broken

design_issues.issue: Event names not displayed in UPPERCASE as required (found 'Кадл' instead of 'КАДЛ')
design_issues.requirement: Event names should be in UPPERCASE according to specifications

passed_tests: Backend API - All 19 endpoints working (100% success)
Daily quote API returns Ukrainian quotes correctly
Statistics API working with monthly data structure
Standalone tasks CRUD operations working
Events CRUD operations working
Settings and reminders management working
Google Calendar export URL generation working
Altegio export endpoint working (returns proper message)
Dashboard shows daily quote with Ukrainian text
Logo displays 'sensa' with 'івент менеджмент' subtitle correctly
Collapsible 'протерміновано' section works with toggle
Headers have centered styling with 'text-center-title' class
Add task button opens standalone task creation dialog
Standalone task creation works (with force click workaround)
Events section shows upcoming events on dashboard
Events page calendar shows event date indicators (4 found)
Event creation form includes 'spots' field with default value 10
Settings page shows 6 reminder items
Reminder editing dialog opens and closes correctly
Statistics page loads and displays properly
4-tab navigation working: завдання, події, статистика, налаштування
Google Calendar and Altegio export buttons present in event dialogs
Event creation form validation and submission working
All page navigation working correctly
Ukrainian localization working throughout app
Mobile-responsive design maintained
Task completion functionality working
Archive functionality accessible
Event detail dialogs with all options working
Calendar date picker functionality working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix event names to display in UPPERCASE as required by specifications. Currently showing normal case (e.g., 'Кадл' should be 'КАДЛ'). This affects event titles in lists, dialogs, and cards throughout the app.
